title: Car Loan Payment Calculator - Monthly Estimate
description: Free car loan payment calculator. Estimate your monthly auto loan payment based on price, down payment, interest rate, and loan term.
keywords: car loan payment calculator, auto loan calculator, car payment estimator, vehicle loan calculator, monthly car payment
intro: Calculate your monthly car loan payment. Enter the vehicle price, down payment, interest rate, and loan term.

faq.q: How is a car loan payment calculated?
faq.a: Car loan payments use the same amortization formula as mortgages: M = P[r(1+r)^n]/[(1+r)^n-1], where P is the loan amount after down payment.

faq.q: What is a good car loan interest rate?
faq.a: As of 2024, good rates range from 4-7% for new cars and 5-10% for used cars, depending on credit score.

faq.q: How long should a car loan be?
faq.a: Most experts recommend 36-60 months. Longer terms mean lower payments but more total interest paid.
